C:
Send invoices in minutes. Get paid in days.

**Headline**
Send invoices in minutes. Get paid in days.

**Subheadline**
Built for solo consultants — create a polished invoice, automate the awkward follow-ups, and stop chasing clients for money you've already earned.

**Primary CTA**
Start invoicing free

**Secondary CTA**
See a sample invoice

**Microcopy (under the button)**
No credit card required · Your first 3 invoices are on us

**Trust line (optional, above or below the fold)**
Join the independent consultants who get paid 2x faster.

---

A couple of notes so you can ship this as-is or tune it:

- **Swap in your product name** wherever you'd open the subheadline, e.g. "Honra is built for solo consultants…" if you want the brand up top.
- **The trust line carries a "2x faster" claim** — keep it only if you can back it with your own data; otherwise replace with a plain social-proof line like "Trusted by 12,000+ independent consultants" (also needs to be a real number) or cut it entirely. I left it in but flag it as the one line you shouldn't ship unverified.
- **For A/B testing,** here's one alternate headline with a different angle (relief vs. speed): *"The invoicing is handled. Get back to the work you bill for."*

Everything else is final and ready to paste into the hero.

Send invoices in minutes. Get paid in days.

**Subheadline**
Built for solo consultants — create a polished invoice, automate the awkward follow-ups, and stop chasing clients for money you've already earned.

**Primary CTA**
Start invoicing free

**Secondary CTA**
See a sample invoice

**Microcopy (under the button)**
No credit card required · Your first 3 invoices are on us

**Trust line (optional, above or below the fold)**
Built for the way independent consultants actually get paid.

---

A couple of notes so you can ship this as-is or tune it:

- **Swap in your product name** wherever you'd open the subheadline, e.g. "Honra is built for solo consultants…" if you want the brand up top.
- **The trust line is now claim-free** so it ships safely without backing data. If you *do* have your own numbers, you can swap it for a sourced stat — e.g. "Consultants on [product] get paid 2x faster *(source: median time-to-payment across paid invoices, 2025)*" or "Trusted by 12,000+ independent consultants" — but only with a real figure and a stated source. Don't ship a number you can't cite.
- **For A/B testing,** here's one alternate headline with a different angle (relief vs. speed): *"The invoicing is handled. Get back to the work you bill for."*

Everything else is final and ready to paste into the hero.
P:
## Hero copy

**Headline**
Send invoices in minutes. Get paid in days.

**Subheadline**
Built for solo consultants. Send a polished invoice, automate the awkward payment reminders, and stop chasing clients for money you've already earned.

**Primary CTA**
Start invoicing free

**Secondary CTA**
See a sample invoice

**Microcopy (under the primary button)**
No credit card required · Free to get started

**Trust line (above or below the fold)**
For consultants who'd rather do the work than the admin.

---

### Before you launch

- **Paste-ready as written.** The only thing to add is your wordmark/brand in the hero. The headline, subheadline, CTAs, microcopy, and trust line carry no unverifiable claims, so they can ship today.

- **Trust line — optional data-backed upgrade.** The line above is deliberately claim-free so it ships now. Once you have defensible numbers, swap it for the stronger version: *"[N] independent consultants get paid [X]× faster."* Use that **only** with real figures you can stand behind — a placeholder metric or invented count is the one thing that turns a hero into a liability.

- **Make sure the secondary CTA has somewhere to go.** "See a sample invoice" needs a real, polished sample (modal or page) live before launch, or drop the button.

- **A/B alternate headline (relief angle, vs. the speed angle above):** *"The invoicing's handled. Get back to the work you bill for."* Same subheadline works under either.
